response.step_by_step_log: 1. Video analyzed to identify performer (Sakura Miko) and section structure. 2. Intro section identified from 00:00 to 01:39. 3. Musical performance of '咲き誇れアイドル' identified from 01:40 to 04:58. 4. Song metadata (Composer: HoneyWorks, Lyricists: HoneyWorks/MARUMOCHI) confirmed via on-screen text and search. 5. Lyrics for '咲き誇れアイドル' found on multiple sites and verified. 6. JSON output constructed.
response.global_summary: The video features VTuber Sakura Miko introducing and performing her song '咲き誇れアイドル' (Sakihokore Idol) on a specially decorated Christmas-themed stage.

scenes.description: Sakura Miko introduces herself and talks to the audience about her new song, with festive Christmas stage lighting in the background.
Sakura Miko performs the song '咲き誇れアイドル' (Sakihokore Idol) with choreography on the Christmas-themed stage. Text on screen identifies the song title and credits.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Because I'm an idol,
I'll keep on challenging myself, dreaming with you.
Is it so bad that I'm clumsy?
I will bloom gloriously.

My first event, the default is no demand.
That kind of me had a dream.
Longing for the way of life called an idol,
"Invincible elite," "Smiling is a cheat."
You, who watch over this kind of me,
What is it you like about me?
Forgive my selfishness.
My stage experience points are soaked in tears,
But even so, I absolutely don't want to lose.
I'll put a message on the cherry blossoms and send it to you,
So that it overflows with love.

Because I'm an idol,
I'll keep on challenging myself, dreaming with you.
Is it so bad that I'm clumsy?
Bloom gloriously,
I won't let it end with just delusions.
I'm being myself, cherry blossom colored, okay?

Polished skills, demonstrating my real ability,
The days I can enjoy have also increased,
I'm living as an idol,
It's all thanks to you.
My ahoge is cute! A guaranteed victory route!
Follow me, will you!
Even my clumsy parts are forgiven,
Isn't it the strongest!?

I swallow the pain I want to speak of,
I want to increase smiles with smiles,
So that the cherry blossom front
Delivers spring to your town.

Idol is the only thing
I don't want to yield.
I want to charm you,
I'm challenging the ideal, run through it.
I'll show you the highest view,
You can believe in the cherry blossoms,
Come on, let's all make them bloom,
Dye the world in full-bloom pink.
Ah, this tear,
It's not because I'm sad,
So rest assured, (It's beautiful).

Because I'm an idol,
I'll keep on challenging myself, dreaming with you.
Is it so bad that I'm clumsy?
Bloom gloriously,
I won't let it end with just delusions.
